TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Jerryd_Bayless, title = Jerryd_Bayless, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jerryd_Bayless} }

S.FORM: Jerryd Bayless hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'aras mari' tay suruw / p'agal tins' tay suruw. kawas tay 1988, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 8, Jerryd Bayless, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Jerryd Bayless hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'aras mari' tay suruw / p'agal tins' tay suruw. kawas tay 1988, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 8, Jerryd Bayless, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *errj* βajles~ɕs~ɕ ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pʔaras~ɕ mariʔ taj s~ɕuruw / pʔaɣal tins~ɕʔ taj s~ɕuruw. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *errj* βajles~ɕs~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
